overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair walking through a foggy neon-lit Night City street at night. The character passes by the Stinson Technologies building, crosses an intersection with palm trees, and continues along wet pavement reflecting vibrant cyan and orange neon lights.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting near a vending machine on the left side of the street

entered.detail: Building with large 'STINSON TECHNOLOGIES' signage and hexagonal logo
Illuminated commercial signs and vending machines with cyan and orange lighting
Tall street lamps casting light through the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow commercial street lined with neon-lit storefronts. The Stinson Technologies building dominates the right side with its prominent signage, while various vending machines and holographic advertisements line the left. The wet asphalt reflects the cyan and orange neon lights through the foggy night air.

events.description: exits narrow street into open intersection with palm trees and wider visibility
futuristic vehicle drives through the intersection as character approaches crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: Tall palm trees lining the intersection in large circular planters
Street sign reading 'Murray' mounted on a black pole
High-rise buildings with illuminated windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with palm trees lining the crosswalk. The character crosses the street with other pedestrians while a futuristic vehicle passes by. The Murray street sign is visible on the right, and tall office buildings rise in the foggy background.

events.description: enters covered walkway with metal railings alongside the road under an overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to the street, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking with a black umbrella

entered.detail: Black metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street below
Large cylindrical structural pillars supporting the overhead transit structure
Holographic screens suspended above the street displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk protected by metal railings, passing under a large concrete overpass structure. Floating digital billboards hover above the street ahead, while the concrete support pillars line the right side. The area is more sheltered from the fog but still illuminated by street lights.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with large overhead digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area, looking around at the surroundings and neon signs

entered.detail: Large circular concrete planters with spiky vegetation
Concrete benches along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide commercial plaza with wet tiled pavement reflecting the neon lights. Large floating digital billboards hover overhead displaying advertisements, while concrete planters and benches line the right side. The area is more open with scattered pedestrians walking through the foggy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, futuristic commercial plaza. It begins on a narrow commercial street where the Stinson Technologies building and holographic advertisements cast cyan and orange reflections across wet asphalt. As the character moves forward, the scene expands into a wide intersection lined with palm trees and towering office buildings, where the camera tracks through a crowd of pedestrians and passing futuristic vehicles. The path then shifts beneath a heavy concrete overpass and along a sheltered sidewalk with metal railings, before finally emerging into an open plaza of wet tiled pavement dominated by massive floating digital billboards.
